case_title: MARTIN ANTONIO AGUILERA VS. KARLA JOANA SANCHEZ ROCHA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY AGUILERA, MARTIN ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ ROCHA, KARLA JOANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, MARTIN ANTONIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00 WAIVED) SERVED AUG-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ ROCHA, KARLA JOANA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MARTIN ANTONIO AGUILERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARLA JOANA SANCHEZ ROCHA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER CARLA CUEVAS. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLED AND WOULD LIKE A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
